mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_role_user (PK_ROLE_USER, PK_ROLE, PK_USER, IS_SYS, IS_LOCK, PK_CREATEDBY, DT_CREATED, PK_MODIFIEDBY, DT_MODIFIED, DS, VERSION) VALUES
(#{item.pkRoleUser}, #{item.pkRole}, #{item.pkUser}, #{item.isSys}, #{item.isLock}, #{item.pkCreatedby}, #{item.dtCreated}, #{item.pkModifiedby}, #{item.dtModified}, #{item.ds}, #{item.version})
